home.heroSubtitle1: Curated smart accessories, tech gadgets, and lifestyle products —
home.heroSubtitle2: bring technology into your everyday life.
home.featuredSubtitle: Highly rated and repurchased items curated for you

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyHint: Browse our products and find something you love

cookie.title: Cookie Settings
cookie.subtitle: Manage cookie preferences and control data usage
cookie.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your shopping experience. You can choose which cookie categories are enabled.
cookie.changeAnytime: You can return to this page anytime to update settings
cookie.whatP1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to keep the site working, remember preferences, and improve the experience.
cookie.whatP2: You can also manage or delete cookies in your browser settings. For more information, see our

necessary.name: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: Required for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
necessary.details: Necessary cookies support login state, security protection, form submission, and cart behavior.

functional.name: Functional Cookies
functional.description: Remember language, interface preferences, and recently viewed items.
functional.details: Some personalized features may be unavailable if disabled, but core shopping remains available.

analytics.name: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand page visits and feature usage.
analytics.details: Data is usually processed in aggregate to improve layout, product presentation, and shopping flow.

marketing.name: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used for advertising, performance measurement, and remarketing.
marketing.details: If disabled, you may still see ads, but they will not be personalized based on your behavior.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.testModeDesc: You may enter any test card number for simulated payment. All payment data is virtual.
checkout.testModeWarn: Do NOT enter real bank card information.
checkout.orderNotePlaceholder: Special delivery instructions (e.g., preferred time, gate code)
checkout.securityNote: Test mode — Payment info will not be processed by a real gateway. All connections are SSL/TLS encrypted.

payment.demoNotice: This is a demo page. Do not enter real bank card information. Test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242
payment.paypalNotice: Click “Confirm & Pay” to continue to the PayPal secure payment page. Demo mode only.
payment.walletNotice: Complete payment in your device verification prompt. Demo mode only.
payment.codNotice: Cash on delivery is only available in mainland China and includes an extra ¥10 handling fee.

coupon.invalidCode: Coupon code is invalid or expired

validation.provinceRequired: Please select or enter a state / province / region

order.successSubtitle: Thank you for shopping at ShopNova. We will process your order shortly.
order.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox. For questions, contact support with your order number.

newsletter.subtitle1: Be the first to know about new arrivals, flash sales, and exclusive coupons —
newsletter.subtitle2: become the first to enjoy the best deals.
newsletter.privacy: We won't spam you. Unsubscribe anytime.

login.benefit4: Exclusive member discounts and early access

register.benefit4: Points rewards — the more you shop, the more you save

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

account.noOrdersHint: Browse products and find something you love

benefit.guaranteeDesc: All products from authorized channels. 100% genuine guaranteed.
benefit.fastShipDesc: Ships within 24 hours. Most areas receive within 2 days.
benefit.returnPolicyDesc: Not satisfied within 7 days? Return for free with fast refund.
benefit.securePayDesc: Multiple payment methods with bank-grade encryption. Your data stays safe.
benefit.title: Why Choose ShopNova
benefit.subtitle: We are committed to the best shopping experience — from curation to after-sales, every step is protected

newArrivals.title: New Arrivals
newArrivals.subtitle: Be the first to experience the latest smart gadgets and tech trends

footer.desc: Curated smart accessories and lifestyle products. Bringing technology into everyday life with quality shopping experiences.

brand-story.title: Brand Story
brand-story.subtitle: ShopNova brings quality smart products to more customers by connecting clear product information with a smoother shopping experience.
brand-story.whyP1: ShopNova starts from everyday categories such as wearables, Bluetooth audio, phone accessories, and computer peripherals. We focus on what shoppers care about most: clear information, transparent pricing, easy specification choices, and smooth checkout.
brand-story.whyP2: This project is designed for ecommerce demos and secondary development. It already includes storefront, product detail, SKU selection, cart, checkout, simulated payment, and admin management features.
brand-story.card1Desc: Designed around product browsing, variant selection, cart, and checkout to reduce friction in the buying journey.
brand-story.card2Desc: Products, orders, payment records, and admin tools form a traceable workflow for store operators.
brand-story.card3Desc: The project leaves clear room for production features such as payments, shipping, coupons, uploads, and permissions.
brand-story.positionDesc: ShopNova is a lightweight, clear, and extensible ecommerce system that can serve as a source-code delivery, demo project, or foundation for a commercial platform.

contact-us.title: Contact Us
contact-us.subtitle: For order questions, after-sales support, business cooperation, or product feedback, contact the ShopNova team through the channels below.
contact-us.serviceDesc: support@shopnova.com for order questions, after-sales support, and account issues.
contact-us.addressDesc: ShopNova Inc., 123 Tech Park, Shanghai 200000, China.
contact-us.noteP1: For order status, payment records, or product after-sales questions, please include your order number, registered email, and issue description.
contact-us.noteP2: For business, media, and recruitment topics, use the corresponding footer pages for more specific contact directions.
contact-us.demoNote: This project is a demo system. The contact details shown here are sample information and can be replaced before customer delivery.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: We welcome people who care about ecommerce, product experience, operational growth, and technical innovation to join ShopNova's next stage.
careers.joinDesc: We are looking for people who care about details and real user problems, whether your strength is engineering, operations, support, or design.
careers.frontendDesc: Build and maintain the storefront, admin panel, interactions, and components with React and TypeScript.
careers.operationDesc: Manage product content, campaigns, order follow-up, and data reviews. Consumer electronics experience is a plus.
careers.supportDesc: Handle pre-sales questions, after-sales support, order tracking, and user feedback.
careers.designDesc: Improve ecommerce workflows, admin tools, and user experience by turning complex flows into clear interfaces.
careers.applyDesc: Send your resume, portfolio, or project notes to careers@shopnova.com. Suggested subject: Role - Name - City.

media-cooperation.title: Press & Media
media-cooperation.subtitle: ShopNova is open to media communication and joint promotion with technology media, creators, brand partners, and channels.
media-cooperation.directionDesc: We welcome cooperation around product launches, reviews, joint campaigns, channel promotion, and content creation.
media-cooperation.card1Desc: Product releases, platform updates, industry insights, and brand story interviews.
media-cooperation.card2Desc: Collaborative marketing around digital products, smart accessories, and campaign moments.
media-cooperation.card3Desc: Reviews, short videos, articles, livestreams, and creator partnerships.
media-cooperation.emailDesc: For media and business cooperation, contact media@shopnova.com with your organization or account profile, cooperation direction, cases, and contact details.

order-lookup.title: Order Lookup
order-lookup.subtitle: Check order status, payment records, item details, and delivery progress. Signed-in users can view all orders in the account center.
order-lookup.card1Desc: The order success page and order email show an order number such as ORD-2026-1234.
order-lookup.card2Desc: Statuses include paid, processing, shipped, completed, and cancelled.
order-lookup.card3Desc: If you cannot sign in or find an order, provide the order number, registered email, and shipping phone number.
order-lookup.actionDesc: Signed-in users can open the account center to view orders. Guests need to sign in with the corresponding account first.
order-lookup.note: The current project supports order lookup mainly through the account center and admin order management. Production can add a standalone lookup form with order number and phone verification.

return-policy.title: Return Policy
return-policy.subtitle: Learn about ShopNova's current return rules, workflow, and important notes for after-sales requests.
return-policy.card1Desc: Submit return requests within 7 days after delivery. Packaging, accessories, and receipts should remain complete.
return-policy.card2Desc: For defects, wrong items, or missing items, keep photos and order information so support can assist quickly.
return-policy.card3Desc: Refunds normally return to the original payment method. Arrival time depends on the payment provider and bank.
return-policy.processDesc: After you submit a request, support verifies the order, item condition, and issue description. Once approved, you receive a return address or replacement arrangement. Refund or reshipment happens after warehouse inspection.
return-policy.noticeDesc: Items damaged by misuse, missing accessories, affecting resale, or outside the service window may not qualify for unconditional returns. Production should add a complete refund and after-sales workflow.

logistics.title: Shipping Info
logistics.subtitle: Check delivery methods, estimated timelines, and shipping notes. After shipment, order details can show delivery progress.
logistics.card1Desc: Checkout supports standard, express, and next-day delivery, each with different fees and timelines.
logistics.card2Desc: Admins can update order status, and user order details show the current processing progress.
logistics.card3Desc: For delays, address issues, or delivery exceptions, contact support with your order number.
logistics.standardDesc: Usually 3-7 business days. Current checkout defaults to free shipping.
logistics.expressDesc: Usually 2-4 business days, with an added shipping fee at checkout.
logistics.nextdayDesc: Available for selected regions and items. Final availability is shown at checkout.
logistics.note: The current project does not integrate a real logistics API. Production can add carriers, tracking numbers, route tracking, and automatic delivery status sync.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about shopping, payment, shipping, after-sales support, and accounts.
faq.q1Title: Why does a product show out of stock?
faq.q1Desc: Stock is determined by product stock and SKU stock. If admin stock exists but the storefront shows out of stock, check whether SKU combinations are complete.
faq.q2Desc: The demo includes WELCOME15, SAVE10, and NOVA20. Production should use a database-backed coupon system.
faq.q3Desc: No. Payment is simulated. Any test card can succeed after required-field validation, and no real gateway is called.
faq.q4Desc: The cart is stored in frontend memory. It does not restore after refresh. Production can add carts and cart_items tables.
faq.q5Title: How do I view order history?
faq.q5Desc: After signing in, open the account center order list to view orders and details for the current account.
faq.q6Desc: Admins can view order lists and details, then update order status to processing, shipped, completed, or cancelled.

legal.updated: Last updated: May 1, 2026 · Effective date: May 1, 2026

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: ShopNova respects your privacy and personal information security. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect personal information.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.body: When you register, place orders, pay, or contact support, we collect information needed to provide the service, including account details, contact information, shipping address, order records, device information, and necessary behavior data.

use.title: How We Use Information
use.body: We use information to process orders, complete delivery, provide support, verify account security, improve shopping experience, manage risk, and send necessary service notifications where legally permitted.

share.title: Information Sharing
share.body: We do not sell your personal information. To fulfill orders, necessary information may be shared with logistics, payment, cloud service, and other partners under confidentiality and security obligations.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.body: We use necessary cookies for login and cart state, and may use functional, analytics, and marketing cookies to improve experience. You can manage preferences in your browser or Cookie settings page.

security.title: Data Security
security.body: We protect data through access control, encrypted transmission, permission isolation, and security reviews. Simulated payment and test authentication in this demo should not be used directly in production.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: You may request access, correction, deletion, or export of personal information, and withdraw certain authorizations. Contact support and we will respond within a reasonable period.

minors.title: Protection of Minors
minors.body: This platform is intended for adults. If you believe we unintentionally collected information from a minor, contact us and we will delete it after verification.

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.body: We may update this policy due to business or legal changes. Major changes will be announced in-app or by email. Continued use means acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: For privacy questions, contact privacy@shopnova.com or support@shopnova.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to ShopNova. By accessing or using this platform, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please stop using the service.

service.title: Service Description
service.body: ShopNova provides ecommerce services such as product browsing, account management, cart, checkout, order tracking, and admin management. Some features are demo implementations.

account.title: Account Registration and Security
account.body: You should provide true, accurate, and complete registration information and keep your account credentials secure. You are responsible for actions under your account.

products.title: Products and Pricing
products.body: We try to keep product images, descriptions, specifications, and prices accurate. Prices may change with campaigns, while confirmed orders follow the price shown at submission.

orders.title: Orders and Payment
orders.body: Submitting an order is an offer to purchase and becomes valid after confirmation. Payment is currently simulated; production use requires a real compliant payment gateway.

shipping.title: Shipping and Logistics
shipping.body: Shipping methods and fees are shown at checkout. Delivery time may be affected by address, holidays, customs, and force majeure.

returns.title: Returns and Refunds
returns.body: Actual return policies should be configured by the merchant in production. The demo project does not yet include a complete refund workflow.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.body: You may not use the platform for fraud, malicious orders, system attacks, bulk scraping, illegal content, or interference with normal services.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.body: Pages, copy, images, logos, and code are protected by intellectual property laws and may not be copied, distributed, or commercially used without permission.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: To the extent allowed by law, services are provided as-is. We are not liable for losses caused by force majeure, third-party service issues, or reasons outside the platform.

law.title: Governing Law and Disputes
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Disputes should first be resolved through negotiation, then by a competent court if needed.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Major changes will be announced in advance. Continued use means acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact legal@shopnova.com or support@shopnova.com.
